D1-d547e351.decision: Escape tag names in HTML export using html.escape
D1-d547e351.rationale: Ensures that special characters in tag names (e.g., quotes, ampersands) are properly HTML‑escaped, preventing malformed HTML and preserving correct rendering of exported bookmarks.

D2-6985d56e.decision: Sanitize asset filenames to ASCII-only characters, replacing non‑ASCII characters with underscores
D2-6985d56e.rationale: Ensures on‑disk filenames are safe to write regardless of filesystem encoding or locale, preventing errors when uploading assets with non‑ASCII characters.
D2-6985d56e.scope: bookmarks/services/assets.py (asset filename generation), any code that creates asset filenames

D3-30510d34.decision: Always compare, store, and query bookmarks using their normalized URL (url_normalized / href_normalized) for deduplication and tag handling
D3-30510d34.rationale: Using the normalized URL ensures that bookmarks differing only by trivial URL variations (trailing slash, query order, etc.) are treated as the same entity, preventing duplicate entries and duplicate tag assignments during import and synchronization.
D3-30510d34.scope: bookmarks/services/importer.py, bookmarks/services/parser.py, any code that queries or creates Bookmark objects

UPDATE-2026-07-04-7f77f00c.decision: UPDATE: Always compare, store, and query bookmarks using their normalized URL (url_normalized / href_normalized) for deduplication and tag handling superseded — cli verify: intentional exact-match dedup by raw URL
UPDATE-2026-07-04-7f77f00c.rationale: cli verify: intentional exact-match dedup by raw URL
